# Auto-Generated Documentation

This directory contains AI-generated documentation from vivi-app source code changes.

## How It Works

1. **Source Changes**: When code changes in `vivi-app` repository
2. **Detection**: GitHub Actions detects changed TypeScript/JavaScript files
3. **AI Generation**: Z.AI GLM-4.7 model generates documentation
4. **Commit**: Changes are committed to `vivim-live`
5. **Deploy**: Vercel automatically deploys the updated docs

## Configuration

- **AI Model**: GLM-4.7 (via z.ai coding plan API)
- **Trigger**: Daily at 2 AM UTC (schedule) + manual trigger
- **Endpoint**: `https://api.z.ai/api/coding/paas/v4`

## Recent Updates

| Date | Description |
|------|-------------|
| $(date +%Y-%m-%d) | Pipeline initialized |

## Manual Trigger

To trigger documentation generation manually:

```bash
gh workflow run auto-docs.yml --repo owenservera/vivim-live
```

## Files

See individual markdown files in this directory for detailed API documentation.
